zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Millicent De Bruley於1215年出生在英國武斯特斯爾阿斯頓 索莫維爾。她於1242年與Richard de Bruley在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1275年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾阿斯頓 索莫維爾享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bruley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French Brûlé (see Brule ). This surname is also found in Britain, where it is of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Brule
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Fernand, Lucien, Andre, Laurent, Marcel, Monique, Normand, Phillippe, Pierre, Raoul, Yvan, Yves.

topographic name for someone living in a place cleared for use by burning, from brûlé ‘burnt’ (Old French bruslé, past participle of brusler ‘to burn’). Some instances of the name may derive from the same word used with reference to disfigurement by burning, either accidentally or as a medieval ordeal or punishment.

nameMeanings.name: Millicent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Melisende, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from amal ‘labour’ + swinth ‘strength’. This was the name of a daughter of Charlemagne. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Millicent De Bruley was born in 1215, in Aston Somerville, Worcestershire, England. She married Richard de Bruley in 1242, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1275, in Aston Somerville, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

ko.Ashton under Hill, Worcestershire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 애슈턴 운더 힐
ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Millicent De Bruley(은)는 1215년 영국 워스스터실르 애스턴 서머빌에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 Richard de Bruley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 애스턴 서머빌에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.
